title: Cogs and Constructs Mod
description: Modifies the game to give a more dnd feel by removing xp cost from enchanting and adding origins and classes to the game.
body:
This is a mod intended to change some of Minecraft's core functions to give Minecraft a DND feel. Not all features are currently included but planned are:

- Rewriting enchanting tables to use no XP and rare item to enchant (Enchanting works, uses more lapis, but GUI incorrect)
- Changing Anvils to use little or no XP to use (Not Started)
- Changing Starting Level to 1 (Not Started)
- Changing Levelling to have more XP and be a curve (XP levels modified, but not curved)
- Races from DND (Finished, just need to reword the descriptions)
- Classes from DND (Implemented, but not all classes have powers or descriptions yet)

As for the dependencies, I will explain them here:

- Pehkui to allow players to be scaled to different heights
- Xerca's music to give bard a more aesthetic feel, allowing certain things to happen when instrument is used
- Origins as the basis for the Races and Classes from DND
